evidence_quotes.quote: It should not be difficult to unregister products than it is to register with them.
However, once you have completed everything and only the final approval step is missing, the price will change just.
On top of this, there is often gambling. So you can’t buy things directly, but you need to buy a “box” you open and perhaps what you want to be in it.
Sometimes it gives content an advantage (pay to win) and sometimes does not.
However, companies often use unfine tricks.

paragraphs.text: First, I would like to mention that I am incredibly happy to live in a part of the world where consumer protection is at all one thing. However, I am somewhat disappointed about how slow Denmark and the EU have been to protect consumers when it comes to digital purchases. It should not be difficult to unregister products than it is to register with them. Some companies are really good in making it easy for consumers to register for and unsubscribe from their product. And I felt that we should reward. However, companies often use unfine tricks. It is often seen that price is a thing when looking for products on price comparison pages or firms’ websites. However, once you have completed everything and only the final approval step is missing, the price will change just. It may be that the cargo just increases slightly because they add more to the cargo of each product added. Or it may just be a payment fee for the tickets you buy. This will only be worse when we talk about buying things inside, for example, computer games. The market for computer games has become increasingly complex. And I think it is unnecessary. But every time you buy a new computer game, it is always a struggle to understand what the price is single and what you get for saying money. And for me to see it only benefits the seller that the price is as opaque as possible. First, you need to find out where to buy the game. Then you need to find out whether the game requires a particular lunch (an extra piece of software), if it can run on one’s operating system, if your hardware can pull the game, if the game requires special access to your PC. For example, systems that require unrestricted access to the whole PC should be cheated. Then you must just assess whether you trust that company and find out if there have been problems with it before. And assess whether the risk is dry. And the vast majority of consumers are not experts in computer security, since they do not understand what the risk of giving a game access to the core of their operating system. And firms do not do anything to make it easier for consumers to understand what they say to. Depending on what you need to look at the price. Games typically come in a number of different variants. Sometimes you can access a bit earlier if you pay a little more. But there are often problems in the first days a game is live. So it may be difficult to assess whether it is worthwhile to pay for earlier access. Once again, you can buy content that has not yet come. So they promise to see something new in 2-6 months. And you can then choose to pay for now. There may also be a number of DLCs. And if you want to play with sighted friends, you typically need to have the same DLCs as the ones. But it can be difficult to understand what content is in a DLC and whether it is the money, other games are entirely free to play. But you can support the game by buying content inside the game. Sometimes it gives content an advantage (pay to win) and sometimes does not. Typically, not just the price in DKK can be seen, but they themselves have made 1-5 different currencies. And you cannot just buy things directly. And it costs to exchange between one and the other. So it can be very difficult to know what things really cost. On top of this, there is often gambling. So you can’t buy things directly, but you need to buy a “box” you open and perhaps what you want to be in it. Prices may also change over time. So you may only be able to buy a dims for the next 12 hours and then it is growing, plus many other tricks to make people spend more and don’t know how much they spend. Other games are completely removed from the internet, so you can never play them again, even if you have bought them. And when you buy them, you don’t know whether the game is game for 14 days, 5 years or 30 years. There is no chance to know this. So you really don’t know what you buy. It is difficult to go into detail, so this was the best one I could
